/usr/bin/ar qc libaws-c-sdkutils.a "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/aws_profile.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_regex.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_rule_engine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_ruleset.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_standard_lib.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_types_impl.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/endpoints_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/partitions.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/resource_name.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-sdkutils.dir/source/sdkutils.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libaws-c-sdkutils.a
